name: Jessica O'Connell, EMILY's List
subject: A new generation of women running for office >>
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7727/24c69fd9/6b06a6/18ef52a2/3174563656/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFEX18N_digital_email_20161216_SteppingUp_n-all&source=WPEFEX18N_digital_email_20161216_SteppingUp_n-all")
---

Peter,

I thought this election might scare women off from taking the brave step of putting their name on the ballot. But over the last month, we've seen a huge surge in women telling EMILY's List they want to learn how to run strong campaigns and run for office.

People are fired up -- and I want to make sure we have the resources to support this unprecedented wave of potential candidates and campaign staffers.

**[Donate $3 to make sure we have the resources to train and support as many of these potential candidates as we can.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7727/24c69fd9/6b06a6/18ef52a3/3174563656/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161216_email_SteppingUp?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+make+sure+we+have+the+resour&utm_campaign=WPEFEX18N_digital_email_20161216_SteppingUp_n-all&source=WPEFEX18N_digital_email_20161216_SteppingUp_n-all")**

This is uncharted territory for us, too. We've seen surges in women wanting to run before -- but nothing like this.

It's a huge opportunity to have a big impact in 2017, 2018, and beyond.

If we're going to support this new wave of women, we're going to need to gather more resources and FAST. The scale of our work really depends on what our community is willing to do.

**Donate $3 to EMILY's List to help elect the next generation of pro-choice Democratic women:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Elect-New-Leaders](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7727/24c69fd9/6b06a6/18ef52dc/3174563656/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161216_email_SteppingUp?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgElectNewLeaders&utm_campaign=WPEFEX18N_digital_email_20161216_SteppingUp_n-all&source=WPEFEX18N_digital_email_20161216_SteppingUp_n-all")**

Thank you,

Jess O'Connell
Executive Director, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7727/24c69fd9/6b06a6/18ef52dd/3174563656/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161216_email_SteppingUp?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WPEFEX18N_digital_email_20161216_SteppingUp_n-all&source=WPEFEX18N_digital_email_20161216_SteppingUp_n-all")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over three million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7727/24c69fd9/6b06a6/18ef52de/3174563656/VEsD/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WPEFEX18N_digital_email_20161216_SteppingUp_n-all&source=WPEFEX18N_digital_email_20161216_SteppingUp_n-all") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7727/24c69fd9/6b06a6/18ef52df/3174563656/VEsA/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=WPEFEX18N_digital_email_20161216_SteppingUp_n-all&source=WPEFEX18N_digital_email_20161216_SteppingUp_n-all"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7727/24c69fd9/6b06a6/18ef52d8/3174563656/VEsB/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WPEFEX18N_digital_email_20161216_SteppingUp_n-all&source=WPEFEX18N_digital_email_20161216_SteppingUp_n-all"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

name: Democrats.org
subject: re: the future of the Democratic Party
body:
Help rebuild the Democratic Party **Every single Democrat is going to need to play a role in building a party we can all be proud of. Before we elect our next party chair, let us know what you'd like to see in the Democratic Party of the future.

** **[SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Rebuild1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+SHARE+YOUR+THOUGHTS&utm_campaign=em_20161217_dnc_nd&source=em_20161217_dnc_nd")**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c243/4067b0a/22ebf624c/7e063bd1/1642800989/VEsHBw/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20161217_dnc_nd&source=em_20161217_dnc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c243/4067b0a/22ebf624c/7e063bde/1642800989/VEsHBg/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161217_dnc_nd&source=em_20161217_dnc_nd"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c243/4067b0a/22ebf624c/7e063bdc/1642800989/VEsHAA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=15+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161217_dnc_nd&source=em_20161217_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

|

name: Democrats.org
subject: When Republicans lose elections...
body:
Fight back against Republican obstructionism.
---
**Make sure Republicans at every level know we're ready to fight back against their undemocratic abuses of power. Chip in $10 or more today:

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c25a/4067b0a/22ea31d8c/7e063d18/3551653922/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20161217_ew_v3s2&source=em_20161217_ew_v3s2")**
Friend --

While Donald Trump sucks up media attention for his embarrassing tweets, skipping out on intelligence briefings, and appointing billionaires, donors, and totally unqualified people to his Cabinet, Republican governors and legislators are trying to fly under the radar while committing egregious acts to undermine the will of the voters.

**[We're going to hold Republicans accountable at every level of government -- but we need your help.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c25a/4067b0a/22ea31d8c/7e063d19/3551653922/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Were+going+to+hold+Republicans+accountab&utm_campaign=em_20161217_ew_v3s2&source=em_20161217_ew_v3s2")**

Yesterday, Maine's Republican Governor Paul LePage ordered the state's Department of Labor not to enforce a minimum wage increase from $3.75 to $5.00 -- which Maine voters overwhelmingly approved in November's election. LePage, who has strong ties to corporate lobbyists and the restaurant industry, has compared the wage increase to "attempted murder." But the real crime here is that the governor is giving businesses the go-ahead to commit wage theft against tipped workers who are already woefully underpaid.

And in North Carolina, where Republican Governor Pat McCrory lost his re-election bid, Republicans in the legislature have introduced a series of bills aimed at stripping power away from Governor-elect Roy Cooper before he takes office -- solely because Cooper is a Democrat. These Republicans have even gone so far as to jail a reporter who was covering their actions on the General Assembly floor.

When voters make their voices heard at the ballot box, politicians on both sides of the aisle have a duty to respect the results of the election. But these Republicans have chosen to take unprecedented and undemocratic steps to undermine the will of their states' voters.

If you're ready to stand up for democracy, pitch in $10 or more right now so Democrats can fight back.

**If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately.

**[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c25a/4067b0a/22ea31d8c/7e063d26/3551653922/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20161217_ew_v3s2&source=em_20161217_ew_v3s2")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c25a/4067b0a/22ea31d8c/7e063d27/3551653922/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20161217_ew_v3s2&source=em_20161217_ew_v3s2")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c25a/4067b0a/22ea31d8c/7e063d24/3551653922/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20161217_ew_v3s2&source=em_20161217_ew_v3s2")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c25a/4067b0a/22ea31d8c/7e063d25/3551653922/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20161217_ew_v3s2&source=em_20161217_ew_v3s2")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $200](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c25a/4067b0a/22ea31d8c/7e063d22/3551653922/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+QUICK+DONATE+200&utm_campaign=em_20161217_ew_v3s2&source=em_20161217_ew_v3s2")**

**Or donate another amount:**

**[https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c25a/4067b0a/22ea31d8c/7e063d23/3551653922/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+httpsmydemocratsorgHelpDemocratsFightBac&utm_campaign=em_20161217_ew_v3s2&source=em_20161217_ew_v3s2")**

** Thank you,

Eric

Eric Walker
Deputy Communications Director
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c25a/4067b0a/22ea31d8c/7e063d20/3551653922/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20161217_ew_v3s2&source=em_20161217_ew_v3s2"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c25a/4067b0a/22ea31d8c/7e063d21/3551653922/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161217_ew_v3s2&source=em_20161217_ew_v3s2"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c25a/4067b0a/22ea31d8c/7e063d2e/3551653922/VEsHBA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161217_ew_v3s2&source=em_20161217_ew_v3s2") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c25a/4067b0a/22ea31d8c/7e063d2f/3551653922/VEsHBw/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161217_ew_v3s2&source=em_20161217_ew_v3s2"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

These Republicans have even gone so far as to jail a reporter who was covering their actions on the General Assembly floor. When voters make their voices heard at the ballot box, politicians on both sides of the aisle have a duty to respect the results of the election. But these Republicans have chosen to take unprecedented and undemocratic steps to undermine the will of their states' voters. If you're ready to stand up for democracy, pitch in $10 or more right now so Democrats can fight back. If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately. "" "" "" "" "" Or donate another amount: "" Thank you, Eric Eric Walker Deputy Communications Director Democratic National Committee Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Vice=20President=2DElect=20Mike=20Pence?=
subject: Trump Transition Team needs you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump for America Inc
body:
We’re putting together an incredible team that will Make America Great Again! |

Friend, President-elect Trump and I have already started working on our agenda to Make America Great Again! As Chair of the TRUMP Transition Team, I’ve been working alongside our next president to vet and help assemble a team of patriotic men and women committed to putting America First. We’re having experts travel in and give briefings and advice on policy. And we’ve been paying for staff to help put together our administration in advance so that we don’t waste a single second once we’re sworn in on January 20. We need to ensure we have the best and brightest from every corner of America at the start of the Trump administration. Please make a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $25 or $10 to help fund our TRUMP Transition Team. In total, we have 4,100 appointed positions we must fill and only 33 days until inauguration to get it done. Donald Trump and I want to hit the ground running as soon as we enter the White House. Which is why we’re taking this holiday season to be fully prepared to enact our First 100 Days agenda. And it goes well beyond hiring the right people. We’re also working on policies and fine-tuning legislation that we can enact on day one. But now we need your help to finish our transition as strong as possible. Please make a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $25 or $10 to help fund our TRUMP Transition Team. Thanks, Mike Pence Vice President-elect of the United States
CONTRIBUTE $100

Please make a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $25 or $10 to help fund our TRUMP Transition Team.

name: catherine@dscc.org
subject: Test your knowledge:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
True or false: the more Democrats test what they know, the better prepared we'll be for the fights ahead. [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eea5/2b07114c/40dfa059/7368c4f3/2138211058/VEsH/ "http://www.dscc.org/quiz/2016-year-end-quiz/?refcode=DPE-20161217-Quiz-ProsHV")
---
I'll be honest, Friend -- we're still unpacking the results of 2016.

**And already, we see a lot of groundwork ahead to rebuild our party and recommit to the values Democrats always fight for.**

[**But to move forward, Friend, we need our supporters up to speed. So we 're sending you a short quiz on the DSCC today: Can you take 2 minutes to complete 6 questions?**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eea5/2b07114c/40dfa059/7368c4f3/2138211058/VEsE/ "http://www.dscc.org/quiz/2016-year-end-quiz/?refcode=DPE-20161217-Quiz-ProsHV")

| [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eea5/2b07114c/40dfa059/7368c4f3/2138211058/VEsF/ "http://www.dscc.org/quiz/2016-year-end-quiz/?refcode=DPE-20161217-Quiz-ProsHV")
---

When supporters test their knowledge (and share with friends!), it arms us with the information to fight back against whatever attacks Donald Trump and the GOP Senate will throw at us.

**So we need to make sure every Democrat is on board for 2017 and beyond.**

[**Friend, will you show us what you know? Take the quiz today (it 'll take just two minutes)!**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eea5/2b07114c/40dfa059/7368c4f3/2138211058/VEsC/ "http://www.dscc.org/quiz/2016-year-end-quiz/?refcode=DPE-20161217-Quiz-ProsHV")

Thanks for your grassroots participation!

Catherine Algeri
DSCC Director of Marketing

P.S. [**Know another Democrat who needs to stay informed? Make sure to share this quiz with them today!**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eea5/2b07114c/40dfa059/7368c4f3/2138211058/VEsD/ "http://www.dscc.org/quiz/2016-year-end-quiz/?refcode=DPE-20161217-Quiz-ProsHV")

**A quick note on donations, Friend:**
We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-20161217-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eea5/2b07114c/40dfa059/7368c4ed/2138211058/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eea5/2b07114c/40dfa059/7368c4ec/2138211058/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eea5/2b07114c/40dfa059/7368c4ef/2138211058/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
